transcript.text:
(There's something different today...?) The size is different from that one!
- Let me try that one then - LOLOL
(Beyond imagination) Wow, this is huge
(It's literally HUGE!) We served it on a large plate
(It's literally HUGE!) Oh really? Awesome
I mean, the size of this is...
18 inches!
It's 18 inches!
Wow
(It's a plate full of spicy stir-fried chicken)
(It's 18 inches today, things are 'bout to go down) Thanks for the food, whoa, it looks delicious
(They just keep coming!)
- I'm sorry? - You don't eat like this every day do you?
Actually, I do
(Is this even real...?)
Hello everyone

I'm here in Junghwa-dong
And I've been craving spicy chicken nowadays
(Today's menu) especially the old-school ones on cast iron plate
(Must-visit restaurant in town) So I found this great local place to eat
Can't wait for this, we're here
('Junghwa Hoban Dak-galbi* Makguksu**', Jungnang-gu, Seoul) * Spicy stir-fried chicken ** Buckwheat noodles
Spicy stir-fried chicken and buckwheat noodles
They even have noodles here!
(Enters the restaurant) Nice to meet you
Everyone around me went crazy...
(Tzuyang is in the house) Because they heard you coming here
(Must) telling me to take a selfie with you
(She was on her way out but she came back...) My kids told me that I should see you in person
Oh really?
(Happy) This is awesome
(Unexpected fan meeting) Thank you

(Holding it down for 20 years) I've been doing this for a while
Oh, wow, 20 years
And they say...
(Certified must-visit place) We got a good chicken dish here
And it smells so good
It's really great
The delicious smell is all over this place!
(Quick order) And it's not a single menu
(Going for the basic one) I should try the normal one without cheese
(5 levels of spiciness) And you can choose the level of spiciness?
- Sir - Yeah
Which level is similar to Shin Ramyun*? *Korean ramen brand
The middle one
(Level 3 is spicy as Shin Ramyun) The middle one?
If you don't like spicy stuff
the best choice would be level 2!

(What was that?) And do you think 10 servings would be a lot?
10?
- Would this be too small? - The cauldron might be too small
(Compromises) What about 8? I think that'll do
I'll have 3 servings of the chicken neck and 5 servings of stir-fry
(Will she really be able to do this?) I'll get them ready
- Level 2, right? - Yeah
(The chicken is being prepared in the kitchen)
(Once you grill them after closing the cast iron lid...)
(The stir-fried chicken is ready to be served)
Whoa, it's huge!!
Since you ordered a lot
(The plate is full of food) We put it on a large plate
The plate is really huge
Bon Appetit! Wow, this looks great
And look at the size of it!

This place serves 9.5 ounces for 1 serving
while it's 7 ounces for other places
This is a lot
About 1.5 times larger
(Spotted chicken neck) Oh, this is the chicken neck
We got chicken neck here
(Main dish) And other parts as well
(Along with extra toppings!) It's got sweet potatoes, rice cakes as well
I'll get a bite of this chicken first
(The size never stops to surprise her) This cast iron plate is really huge!
It's supposed to be a different plate
But he served it in this one because I ordered a lot
I'm so glad that I came here today
(It's the most legit way) You gotta serve these in cast iron!
I like the sauce as well
(Gotta give it a mix for moist)

I asked him to
not put in the veggies here
(Plate full of meat) So this is basically a party of protein here
I'll try the chicken neck too
This is the chicken neck
You can tell it from its unique shape
I think I should've ordered half and half, it's so good!
It feels like I'm eating cartilages
It's gummy
and chewy
Feels like I'm eating the backbone
(Subtitle) Cartilage in backbones
(Got sesame leaf and lettuce for a wrap) Let's get that in
A bit of chicken neck as well
I really like these extra toppings in here
Let's dip it into the sauce

I wonder...
The flavor gets stronger but it's good!
(Invented another menu with a chopstick) Chicken skewers
(In one bite)
The spiciness is quite normal
Slightly less spicy than Shin Ramyun
(For the fans of non-spicy food) The spiciness is just there
So even if you aren't a fan of spicy food, you'll be able to eat it
If you can't handle kimchi...
Then it's level 1 for you
Why is it called dak-galbi* anyway? *Chicken-Ribs
(A sudden question) Why does it have ribs in its name?
Originally, the meat was all minced
and they were grilled on a charcoal
And the meat on the drumstick was
shaped in to form of ribs, that's why

It's really tender part of the chicken
Oh, so it's the shape that got its name from
That's interesting
Chicken neck
Let's get 3 pieces (at once)
This is just huge
I keep eating and it's still full!
I mean, the size of this is...
(As long as her arm?) From here to here
(As long as her arm?) About this long?
It's really huge
I wonder how big it is
It's 18 inches
(If you don't know, now you know) You even brought a tapeline...LOL
Thank you for that
It's 18 inches

Wow
It's big as a lid of a huge cauldron
(The owner is busy making sales) We're filming our store today
How can she fit all that into her body?!
It's a mystery
(Doesn't look like a big eater at all) Huh?
(The regular customers showed their support)
Enjoy your food!!
Let's bring the sides into the middle like this
(This is when you need udon) I should really add the udon noodles now
I think it's about time
(Ran out of patience) I really should get it now
(So she's ordering some) Sir
- I'd like extra udon noodles - Udon?
(The noodles are being covered with sauce)
You really eat so well!

- You eat as much as me(?) - Wha?
(Is this a challenge...?) I can handle this
(Is this a challenge...?) Oh, really?
Do you eat a lot too?
Yeah, I like eating as well
But not up to 8 servings
(Challenge canceled)
(Let's get some udon!) Oh, this looks delicious
It's a must to have udon noddles for this stir-fried chicken
The chewy noodles and ramen are great as well
(It's a must-have extra topping) But isn't it udon that's way more popular?
Whoa!
(Getting coke and sprite, just to be fair)
Now this is chicken wrapped in noodles
(This is it)
(She really felt the fizziness) Ugh, it's really carbonated

I feel like I'm bout to cry
(Not a still image)
Oh, I should get some cheese on it!
Sir?!
- Can I add extra cheese? - Yeah
I was going to add it when I'm halfway through
How can I forget about it?
- It's finely shredded mozzarella - Whoa! Awesome!
- May I? - Yeah, it's a lot
(The cheese is sprinkled on the top)
Looks like it snowed here
(This is that) Stir-fried chicken with cheese
Whoa
It's so good
The cheese makes it even better
(It looks even more appetizing) The cheese always makes the presentation better

And I still got many more left to go, it's a lot
(But fried rice is a must too) When should I ask for the fried rice?
(One more extra menu) If you want it now, I'll fix you up some now
(Let's get the chicken on the side and fry them)
(Perilla oil is a must...) It's actually better to use perilla oil than sesame oil
(The fried rice is done!)
I'll get a bite
Mmm! My goodness
Gosh, it's so good
(Mild & clean radish water kimchi) This is really mild
(Mild & clean radish water kimchi) I guess you could say
it's a bit bland?
But it really
(Even balances the saltiness) goes well with the salty chicken
And I've been saving sweet potatoes for this moment
Let's get some on top of that!

(Inner peace)
(Collab with the carbohydrates) This time, it's udon noodles
The fried rice is just awesome here
Unlike the other fried rice plates, the rice here
is very chewy and glutinous
What makes it so different? Is it the rice
(I want to buy that recipe) It's so good!
It's just like a cherry on the top, it's so good
(Scraping the last bit of rice)
(And starts to really dig in)
(The other customers had to ask...) I just can't figure out all these mukbang people
You eat like this on normal days?
- Huh? - You don't eat like this every day, do you?
I do actually
So you eat 12 servings
and the same next day?

Yeah
I don't skip my meals actually...
Then 3 meals a day would be 36 servings!
Don't you gain weight from this?
A little bit actually
- Right? - Yeah
I was just worried...
She even ate extra udon and fried rice as well
And check out the soda as well!
She drank 5 of them alone!
Wait, don't you drink
5 bottles of soju alone?
(If it's soju, of course)
I guess everyone has their
(And the huge plate is about to get emptied) Where did it all go? I ate them all
(All that chicken is gone...)

(But she never stops to eat)
(Scraping the pan to get every bit of them)
(Nom)
(And there's the empty plate...) That was really great
(Cleared one huge plate of stir-fried chicken)
And it's so clean!
You ate everything!
Yeah! I really enjoyed it
- Was it good? - Yeah!!!
(Don't forget, they serve 1.5 times more than other stores)
The amount of food is our thing as well
That's why it was even better!
(And a quick autograph session) Can I get an autograph? My daughter is a big fan of yours...
She's really a big fan
(The celebrity in the industry of mukbang)
(Here's the autograph) Thank you

The size is different from that one!
Let me try that one then
It's for 10 people
That's amazing! Haha
So I've eaten spicy stir-fried chicken today
And I bet it'll be better when you share it with your loved ones
It's a shame that I had to eat alone today
But if you have a stir-fried chicken place in your neighborhood
I bet you'll have a great time sharing this food with your friends and family
Thanks for the food today!
